title: Fast Fiction Factory Production Adoption Authorization Packet

proposed_production_target_classes.mutation_behavior: Future-only update or create a Profile object entry that links the brass moth key label to the original source span without canonizing unresolved truth.
proposed_production_target_classes.rollback_owner: author approves rollback; implementer removes the profile mutation and preserves the source evidence trail
proposed_production_target_classes.approval_requirement: explicit user approval for Profile mutation plus unresolved brass moth truth review

proposed_production_target_classes.mutation_behavior: Future-only accept the source-backed claim into the production Claim Ledger while keeping canon approval separate and preserving source refs.
proposed_production_target_classes.rollback_owner: author approves rollback; implementer returns the claim to held/adoption-candidate state with audit trail
proposed_production_target_classes.approval_requirement: explicit user approval for Claim Ledger mutation and canon-risk acknowledgement

proposed_production_target_classes.mutation_behavior: Future-only add or update a Timeline entry if the user confirms a sequence/order implication for the moth key label.
proposed_production_target_classes.rollback_owner: author approves rollback; implementer removes the timeline mutation and keeps source references readable
proposed_production_target_classes.approval_requirement: explicit user approval for Timeline mutation plus ordering/dependency review

proposed_production_target_classes.mutation_behavior: Deferred future-only story-seed mutation; no current story-seed target is selected by the existing readbacks.
proposed_production_target_classes.rollback_owner: author approves rollback; implementer removes the story-seed mutation and leaves Claim Ledger evidence intact
proposed_production_target_classes.approval_requirement: explicit user request naming a Story Seed mutation target

recommendation_reason: Claim Ledger is the narrowest first production target because the source-backed object label is already represented as a held claim; Profile, Timeline, and Story Seed writes can remain downstream of explicit approval.
evidence_required_before_production_muta: explicit human approval for this candidate
target class selection among Profile, Claim, Timeline, or a deliberately deferred Story Seed path
source refs and original source-span readback
contradiction, malformed-span, downstream-gate, and provider-boundary checks passing
rollback condition and owner recorded before mutation
production target class selected by user
production rollback owner confirmed by user
production rollback descriptor accepted before mutation
what_this_packet_proves: The rollback-rehearsed sandbox candidate can be presented as a production adoption authorization packet.
Potential production target classes, mutation behavior, rollback owner, rollback descriptors, and missing approvals are explicit.
No production mutation, production rollback, canonization, provider, credential, publishing, or production generation route is opened.
what_this_packet_does_not_prove: It does not approve production adoption.
It does not canonize the claim or resolve brass moth truth, Toma fate, Council motive, moth-key function, or contradictory claim truth.
It does not write Profile, Claim Ledger, Timeline, Story Seed, database, provider output, credentials, publishing, or production surfaces.

proposed_targets_and_recommended_first_c.detail: targets=Profile, Claim Ledger, Timeline, Story Seed; recommended=Claim Ledger
